title: Role
description: A Role is a named access-control grant referenced by Operational Rules (`type: access`) and by Positions. Roles describe what the system lets an actor touch, independent of any particular job title or Position. Role is a Product-layer primitive because it defines product-level access semantics consumed by both API and UI cells.

name.description: The lowercase snake_case name of the role.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this role grants.

examples.name: underwriter
examples.description: May approve or reject loan applications.
